sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: IperionX Secures Titanium Order from American Rheinmetall
feed.summary: IperionX has secured a $300,000 prototype order from American Rheinmetall to produce 700 lightweight titanium components for US Army heavy ground combat vehicles. The components, made from 100% recycled titanium using IperionX's patented low-cost technologies, are expected to reduce component weight by 40-45%. This deal supports US priorities to re-shore critical materials supply chains and expand domestic manufacturing.

feed.title: UTime Ltd schedules extraordinary general meeting for January 26
feed.summary: UTime Ltd (NASDAQ:UTME) announced it will hold an extraordinary general meeting for shareholders on January 26, 2026, at 10:00 AM EST. Both Class A and Class B ordinary shareholders are invited to the meeting. The specific agenda items were not disclosed in the SEC filing.

feed.title: Genesco amends credit agreement to extend maturity and adjust interest rates
feed.summary: Genesco Inc. announced it has amended its credit agreement with Bank of America, N.A., extending the maturity date to January 16, 2031. The amendment maintains borrowing base calculations and collateral, while modifying interest rate calculations for both Canadian and domestic borrowings. It also introduces a new level to the pricing grid for revolving credit facility margins, ranging from 1.25% to 1.75% for Term SOFR, Term CORRA, and alternative currency loans.

feed.title: Preferred Bank Net Income Rises In Q4
feed.summary: Preferred Bank (PFBC) reported a significant increase in net income for the fourth quarter, reaching $34.8 million, up from the previous year. This translated to $2.79 net income per share, exceeding analyst expectations, primarily due to an $8.1 million occupancy charge. The bank also saw its revenue climb to $78.1 million, with its stock trading up 2.00 percent in pre-market hours.

feed.title: Amazon.com to Webcast Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Results Conference Call
feed.summary: Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) announced it will hold a conference call to discuss its fourth quarter 2025 financial results on Thursday, February 5, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. PT/5:00 p.m. ET. The event will be webcast live, and the audio and associated slides will be available for at least three months at www.amazon.com/ir. This announcement was made by Business Wire.

feed.title: AK3.DE Akamai Technologies (XETRA) closes at EUR 97.03 on 22 Jan 2026: most active stock, outlook
feed.summary: Akamai Technologies (AK3.DE) closed at EUR 97.03 on XETRA, featuring high trading volume and attention. The stock shows constructive technicals, trading above its 50-day and 200-day average prices, and is rated "BUY" by Meyka AI with a B+ grade. Key financial metrics indicate relative value compared to the Technology sector, though risks like high leverage and market shifts are noted.

feed.title: Two BNY Mellon muni funds raise monthly income for investors
feed.summary: BNY Mellon Investment Adviser, Inc. announced that two of its municipal bond closed-end funds, BNY Mellon Strategic Municipal Bond Fund, Inc. (DSM) and BNY Mellon Strategic Municipals, Inc. (LEO), have increased their monthly distributions. The distributions, payable on February 27, 2026, to shareholders of record on February 12, 2026, will be $0.026 per share, reflecting a $0.003 increase due to higher yields on the funds' investments. BNY Investments manages $2.2 trillion in assets and is part of BNY, America's oldest bank with $59.3 trillion in assets under custody and/or administration.

feed.title: Associated Banc-Corp earnings beat by $0.02, revenue topped estimates
feed.summary: Associated Banc-Corp (NYSE: ASB) surpassed analyst expectations for its fourth-quarter earnings, reporting an EPS of $0.72 against an estimate of $0.70. The company also exceeded revenue forecasts, posting $389M compared to the estimated $382.1M. Following these results, ASB's stock price has shown positive performance, increasing by 7.35% in the last three months and 8.45% over the past year.

feed.title: CSX railroad profit slips 2% as shipping demand remained weak and severance costs hurt results
feed.summary: CSX announced a 2% slip in fourth-quarter profit, earning $720 million, or 39 cents per share, primarily due to weak shipping demand and $50 million in severance costs from recent layoffs. While revenue decreased slightly by 1% to $3.51 billion, the company anticipates only low single-digit revenue growth in 2026 and has withdrawn its 2027 targets. Despite these financial setbacks, CSX improved operational efficiency by completing major construction projects, leading to faster train speeds and better on-time delivery rates.

feed.title: Bank of New York Mellon issues $1.55 billion in senior notes due 2030
feed.summary: The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (NYSE:BK) has issued $1.55 billion in senior medium-term notes due 2030, comprising both fixed rate/floating rate callable senior notes and floating rate callable senior notes. This debt issuance adds to its existing total debt of approximately $75.16 billion. The announcement follows a strong fourth-quarter earnings report for 2025, which exceeded analyst expectations, leading several firms to raise their price targets for the company.

feed.title: Valero Energy increases quarterly dividend by 6.2% to $1.20 per share
feed.summary: Valero Energy Corporation announced a 6.2% increase in its quarterly cash dividend to $1.20 per share, marking the third consecutive year of dividend raises. The dividend is payable on March 9, 2026, to shareholders of record on February 5, 2026, and the company has maintained dividend payments for 37 consecutive years. Valero is set to release its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings on January 29, 2026.

feed.title: Capital One acquiring fintech Brex for $5.2B
feed.summary: Capital One has announced its acquisition of the fintech company Brex for $5.2 billion. This deal marks one of the largest bank acquisitions of a fintech, further expanding Capital One's financial technology offerings. The news follows Capital One's recent financial results reported on Thursday afternoon.

feed.title: Clorox acquiring GOJO Industries for $2.25 billion
feed.summary: The Clorox Co. is acquiring Akron-based GOJO Industries, known for Purell hand sanitizer, for $2.25 billion in cash. The deal is expected to have net purchase price of $1.92 billion after tax benefits, with GOJO reporting nearly $800 million in annual sales. Both companies expressed excitement about combining their expertise to enhance health and hygiene solutions globally.

feed.title: A Glimpse Into The Expert Outlook On Cencora Through 11 Analysts
feed.summary: Cencora (NYSE: COR) has been analyzed by 11 analysts over the past three months, resulting in a diverse set of ratings from bullish to neutral. The average 12-month price target for Cencora is $393.82, an 11.98% increase from the previous average. The company shows strong financials with above-average market capitalization, positive revenue growth of 5.92%, and excellent net margin, ROE, and ROA, though it carries a high debt-to-equity ratio.

feed.title: Vaxcyte Advances Adult and Infant Programs for VAX-31, a Potential Best-in-Class, Next-Generation Pneumococcal Conjugate Vaccine
feed.summary: Vaxcyte, Inc. has provided an update on the advancement of its next-generation 31-valent pneumococcal conjugate vaccine (VAX-31) across both adult and infant clinical programs. The company has dosed the first participants in a Phase 3 study for adults, OPUS-2, and plans to initiate another Phase 3 study, OPUS-3, in the first quarter of 2026. For the infant indication, Vaxcyte has completed enrollment in its Phase 2 dose-finding study.

feed.title: Parker Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
feed.summary: Parker Hannifin (NYSE: PH) announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $1.80 per share, payable on March 6, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 6, 2026. This dividend marks the company's 303rd consecutive quarterly payout and continues a 69-year streak of annual dividend increases, placing it among the top five longest-running records in the S&P 500. Parker Hannifin is recognized as a Fortune 250 global leader in motion and control technologies.

feed.title: Parker Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
feed.summary: Parker Hannifin Corporation has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $1.80 per share, payable on March 6, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 6, 2026. This marks the company's 303rd consecutive quarterly dividend and extends its streak of annual dividend increases to 69 fiscal years, placing it among the top five S&P 500 companies for dividend consistency. Parker Hannifin is recognized as a Fortune 250 global leader in motion and control technologies.

feed.title: United Joins American, Delta, Southwest, Alaska and More Airlines in United States Make History with Corporate Ticket Sales: Full Comparative Study on Business Travel, Premium Cabin Bookings and Luxury Flight Journey
feed.summary: In 2024 and 2025, United Airlines, alongside American, Delta, Southwest, Alaska, and other U.S. carriers, achieved record-breaking corporate ticket sales, signaling a significant shift in business travel towards premium cabins and luxury flights. This surge is driven by companies prioritizing comfort, productivity, and efficiency for their executives. The article provides a comparative study of how these airlines are adapting to this demand, with Delta and United leading in premium services and corporate loyalty programs, while others like Southwest and Spirit cater to more budget-conscious business travelers.

feed.title: CSX (NASDAQ:CSX) Reports Sales Below Analyst Estimates In Q4 CY2025 Earnings
feed.summary: CSX (NASDAQ:CSX) reported Q4 CY2025 sales and non-GAAP profit below analyst estimates, with revenue flat year-on-year at $3.51 billion and adjusted EPS of $0.39. The freight rail services provider experienced a cyclical downturn in the Rail Transportation industry, leading to a 0.9% year-on-year revenue decline and a decrease in operating margin over the last five years. Despite the miss, the stock traded up 4.2% immediately after the results.

feed.title: Valero Energy raises annual dividend payout to $4.80 a share
feed.summary: Valero Energy Corporation announced that its Board of Directors has approved an increase in the regular quarterly cash dividend on common stock from $1.13 per share to $1.20 per share, resulting in an annualized dividend rate of $4.80 per share. The dividend is payable on March 9, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 5, 2026. Valero also plans to host a conference call on January 29, 2026, to discuss its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 earnings results.

feed.title: FISERV INVESTIGATION ALERT: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. is
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C., a shareholder rights law firm, is investigating potential claims against Fiserv, Inc. (NASDAQ:FISV) on behalf of long-term stockholders. This investigation follows a class action complaint filed on November 4, 2025, alleging Fiserv made misleading statements regarding its initiatives and revised 2025 guidance. The firm encourages Fiserv long-term stockholders to contact them to discuss their legal rights regarding potential breaches of fiduciary duties.

feed.title: 3,300 workers on standby as Texas braces for weekend ice storm
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy (NYSE:CNP) has activated its Emergency Operations Center and expanded its workforce to approximately 3,300 employees and contractors in preparation for a forecasted winter weather system impacting Texas from January 22-26, 2026. The company has implemented various readiness measures, including inspecting substations, positioning CNG trucks, and increasing customer communications, while cautioning about potential ice accumulation, hazardous travel, and a hard freeze through Monday morning. Despite generally positive initial weather model trends, CenterPoint emphasizes preparedness and reminds customers about safety around downed power lines.

feed.title: Infovista recognized in the 2025 Gartner® Market Guide for CSP Service and Network Assurance Solutions
feed.summary: The article mentions that Infovista has been recognized in the 2025 Gartner Market Guide for CSP Service and Network Assurance Solutions. This recognition highlights Infovista's position in the market for communication service provider offerings related to service and network assurance.

feed.title: Clean Eatz Kitchen to Appear on QVC Tuesday with Cauliflower Crust Personal Pizzas
feed.summary: Clean Eatz Kitchen, a healthy frozen meal company, will be featured on QVC's "Gourmet Holiday" segment on Tuesday, January 13, 2026. Co-founder Evonne Varady will present their cauliflower crust personal pizzas, available in four varieties, offering a convenient and protein-packed alternative to traditional pizza. The pizzas will be offered at a special price of $59.98 with free shipping and handling during the QVC appearance.

feed.title: Pork Producer Smithfield Foods to Buy Nathan’s Famous for $450 Million
feed.summary: Smithfield Foods, a pork producer, announced its intent to acquire Nathan's Famous, Inc. for $450 million. The acquisition will allow Smithfield to fully own the Nathan's Famous brand, which it has licensed since 2014, and aims to drive growth in packaged meats, increase foodservice sales, and achieve operating efficiencies including $9 million in cost savings. The deal, which has been approved by Nathan's Famous's Board of Directors, is expected to close in the first half of 2026.

feed.title: Capital One Q4 earnings miss as credit loss provision, expenses climb (COF:NYSE)
feed.summary: Capital One (COF) reported weaker-than-expected Q4 earnings, with adjusted EPS missing analyst estimates and GAAP EPS below the previous quarter. The miss was attributed to increased expenses and higher provisions for credit losses, partly due to the acquisition of Discover Financial. While the Discover acquisition boosted revenue and net interest income, it also incurred significant costs related to intangible amortization and integration.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical Stock Climbs After Company Tops Q4 Earnings
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) reported strong financial results for the fourth quarter, surpassing analyst expectations for both revenue and earnings per share. The company saw a 19% increase in total revenue year-over-year, driven by significant growth in da Vinci procedure volumes and system placements. Looking ahead, Intuitive Surgical anticipates continued growth in da Vinci procedures for 2026.

feed.title: ONE Gas Sets 2025 Results Release, 2026 Earnings Calendar
feed.summary: ONE Gas (OGS) announced it will release its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results on February 18, 2026, followed by a conference call and webcast on February 19. The company also provided its full 2026 investor communications calendar, scheduling consistent quarterly earnings releases and calls to ensure predictable engagement with stakeholders. An analyst rating on OGS stock currently shows a Hold with a $73.00 price target.

feed.title: NiSource declares $0.30 quarterly dividend payable in February
feed.summary: NiSource Inc. has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.30 per share, payable on February 20, 2026, to stockholders of record as of February 3, 2026. The utility company has a history of 39 consecutive years of dividend payments and 9 years of increases, with a current yield of 2.56%. This announcement follows strong financial performance and positive analyst ratings, partly due to growth potential from data center development.

feed.title: Jabil declares $0.08 quarterly dividend payable in March
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.08 per share, payable on March 3, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 17, 2026. This continues the company's consistent dividend payments since 2006, supported by an annual dividend yield of 0.13% and aggressive share buybacks. The announcement follows strategic moves including the pricing of $1 billion in senior notes, the acquisition of Hanley Energy Group, and a minority investment in Eagle Harbor Technologies.

feed.title: Jabil appoints Steve Raymund as chairman, adds two board members
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. has appointed Steve Raymund as Chairman of its Board of Directors and added Thomas T. Edman and Raejeanne Skillern as new board members. Raymund, a long-serving director and former CEO of Tech Data, expressed honor in his new role, while the new additions bring expertise in critical capabilities and end-markets as Jabil celebrates its 60th anniversary. This announcement comes alongside recent financial activities including senior note offerings, an acquisition, dividend declarations, and a strategic partnership, reflecting Jabil's efforts to strengthen its market position.

feed.title: Capital One Stock Slides On Q4 Earnings Miss, Purchase Of Brex
feed.summary: Capital One Financial (NYSE: COF) shares dropped after missing Q4 earnings estimates, reporting $3.86 per share against an expected $4.11. Despite beating revenue estimates with $15.58 billion, the company announced the acquisition of fintech company Brex Inc. for $5.15 billion. The stock fell 4.42% in extended trading following the report.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips execs urge water reuse in the Permian Basin
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips executives, including Permian region president Aaron Hunter and executive vice president Nick Olds, emphasized the immense potential of the Permian Basin. They advocated for increased water reuse in the region to manage the significant quantities of water produced alongside oil, urging state agencies to collaborate on beneficial reuse standards. Additionally, they called for state facilitation in building new transmission lines to support the Permian Basin's rising electricity demands.

feed.title: Congress grills UnitedHealth CEO Stephen Hemsley on claim denials, insurance costs
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group CEO Stephen Hemsley faced a bipartisan grilling from the U.S. House Energy and Commerce Committee regarding claim denials, high insurance costs, and executive pay. Lawmakers questioned whether the company's massive size contributes to unaffordability, pushing back on Hemsley's assertion that rising healthcare costs are the primary driver. The hearing also touched upon the controversy surrounding pharmacy benefit managers (PBMs) and an earlier stock sell-off UnitedHealth experienced.

feed.title: Deere’s finance chief Joshua Jepsen to join Honeywell’s aerospace unit By Reuters
feed.summary: Joshua Jepsen, the chief financial officer of Deere & Co., will be stepping down from his role on February 19 to join Honeywell's aerospace unit as its CFO starting February 23. Deere has appointed Ryan Campbell as the interim finance chief while they search for a permanent replacement.

feed.title: Associated Banc-Corp: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Associated Banc-Corp (ASB) reported strong fourth-quarter results, with net income of $137.1 million and earnings of 80 cents per share, surpassing analyst expectations. The Green Bay, Wisconsin-based bank also achieved revenue of $623.7 million, with net interest expense revenue at $393.6 million, exceeding Street forecasts. For the full year, the company posted a profit of $474.8 million, or $2.77 per share, on revenue of $1.5 billion.

feed.title: Fortinet Firewalls Hit With Malicious Configuration Changes
feed.summary: Arctic Wolf Labs has observed malicious activity targeting Fortinet firewalls through single sign-on (SSO) logins, leading to unauthorized configuration changes and exfiltration of firewall configuration files. This activity, suspected to be automated, is similar to a previous campaign following the disclosure of critical Fortinet vulnerabilities (CVE-2025-59718 and CVE-2025-59719). Concerns have been raised that patches for these vulnerabilities may not have fully mitigated the threat, with reports of compromises on supposedly updated devices.

feed.title: Clorox to Acquire GOJO, Expanding Hygiene Portfolio
feed.summary: Clorox announced an agreement to acquire GOJO Industries, the maker of Purell, for $2.25 billion in cash. This acquisition aims to expand Clorox's presence in health and hygiene, particularly in B2B and retail channels, by leveraging GOJO's strong distribution network and recurring revenue base. Clorox anticipates at least $50 million in cost synergies, expecting the deal to be accretive to growth, adjusted EBITDA margins, and adjusted EPS in the second year, while reaffirming its fiscal 2026 outlook.

feed.title: WEC Energy's longest-serving CEO retires as first Chairman Emeritus
feed.summary: WEC Energy Group announced the retirement of its longest-serving CEO, Gale Klappa, from the board after the May annual meeting. Klappa will be named Chairman Emeritus, a first for the company. Scott Lauber, the current president and CEO, is slated to become chairman, continuing a legacy of 23 consecutive years of dividend increases and sustained earnings growth.

feed.title: RXNT Recognized as a 2026 Gartner Digital Markets Leader Across Five Categories, Highlighting Excellence in Ambulatory Healthcare Software
feed.summary: RXNT, a Maryland-based ambulatory healthcare technology company, has been recognized as a 2026 Gartner Digital Markets Leader, earning five Shortlist and five FrontRunner awards. These accolades highlight RXNT's excellence in Medical Billing, Practice Management, Electronic Medical Records software, and specialized solutions for Mental Health and Physical Therapy. The recognition is based on data-driven methodologies and trusted user reviews on Gartner Digital Markets' platforms, reinforcing RXNT's commitment to customer satisfaction and innovative, AI-powered software.

feed.title: Cisco’s Zero-Day RCE Nightmare: UC Flaw Sparks Urgent Patching Frenzy
feed.summary: Cisco has issued urgent patches for a zero-day remote code execution (RCE) flaw (CVE-2026-20045) in its Unified Communications suite, which is under active exploitation. The vulnerability, rated 9.8 CVSS, allows unauthenticated attackers to gain root access to affected systems without user interaction. Organizations are advised to apply version-specific updates immediately and implement robust mitigation strategies, including firewalls and continuous monitoring, to protect against potential compromises.

feed.title: Microsoft: Cloud Margins Are The Tripwire Heading Into FQ2 Earnings (Downgrade) (MSFT)
feed.summary: The author is downgrading Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) to a Hold before its FQ2 2026 earnings due to concerns about a cautious FQ3 margin guide in the Cloud segment, driven by depreciation hikes and potentially high CapEx. Despite a recent selloff, attributed to sentiment rather than deteriorating fundamentals, the author believes the market might not react positively to these margin pressures. Street EPS and revenue projections for the next 12 months remain unchanged since the last quarter, despite general pessimism in the software infrastructure industry.

feed.title: BNY to Speak at the BofA Securities Financial Services Conference
feed.summary: BNY (The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation) announced that its Chief Financial Officer, Dermot McDonogh, will speak at the BofA Securities Financial Services Conference in Miami, Florida on February 11, 2026, at 12:10 p.m. ET. A live webcast and an archived version of the audio will be available on the BNY investor relations website. BNY highlights its role as a global financial services platform, managing $59.3 trillion in assets under custody and/or administration and $2.2 trillion in assets under management as of December 31, 2025.

feed.title: Autodesk Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: Autodesk Inc. (ADSK) shares rose 4.79% to $269.77 on Thursday, outperforming its competitors and the broader market. This marked the second consecutive day of gains for the company's stock, as the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average also saw increases.

feed.title: Perimeter Solutions completes acquisition of MMT for $685 million
feed.summary: Perimeter Solutions has completed the acquisition of Medical Manufacturing Technologies (MMT) for approximately $685 million in cash. This strategic move expands Perimeter's presence into the medical technology sector, complementing its existing fire safety and specialty chemical businesses. The acquisition was financed through cash on hand and a $550 million senior secured notes offering, with analysts projecting continued profitability for Perimeter Solutions.

feed.title: Jin Medical (ZJYL) targets full-capacity launch at new Chuzhou plant
feed.summary: Jin Medical International Ltd. (ZJYL) is nearing completion of its new manufacturing facility in Chuzhou, Anhui Province, China, with full-capacity production expected by the end of April 2026. The facility, which obtained a Class I medical device production license in December 2025, is projected to produce 200,000 units annually of mid-to-high-end electric wheelchairs and senior mobility scooters. This expansion aims to enhance the company's manufacturing scale, supply chain resilience, and global market competitiveness.

feed.title: Terns Pharmaceuticals amends license agreement with Hansoh for TERN-701 rights
feed.summary: Terns Pharmaceuticals has amended its license agreement with Hansoh (Shanghai) Healthtech Co., Ltd. for TERN-701, a therapeutic product for oncology indications. The new amendment grants Terns Pharmaceuticals exclusive worldwide rights, excluding the Hansoh Territory, to patents and applications related to TERN-701, replacing a previous non-exclusive license. Terns will pay a one-time upfront fee of $1 million and tiered royalties on net sales, reinforcing its strong financial position and recent positive clinical and financial developments.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt joins Triumph Network for automated payment solutions
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services (NASDAQ:JBHT) has partnered with Triumph (NYSE:TFIN) to integrate automated payment solutions, aiming to streamline carrier payment cycles within its transportation network. This collaboration enhances J.B. Hunt's operational efficiency and expands the reach of Triumph's payment ecosystem, which focuses on modernizing freight transactions. The announcement follows J.B. Hunt's strong fourth-quarter earnings and a recent dividend increase, reflecting the company's robust market position.

feed.title: Invitation Homes Announces Tax Treatment of 2025 Dividends
feed.summary: Invitation Homes Inc. announced the tax treatment of its 2025 dividends for its Common Stock, providing a detailed table summarizing cash distributions, taxable dividends, capital gain distributions, and other tax-related figures per share. The company advises stockholders to consult their own tax advisors regarding federal, state, and local taxation of these dividends as the disclosed information is based on the best available data prior to the 2025 tax return filing. Invitation Homes, an S&P 500 company, is a leading single-family home leasing and management company.

feed.title: Travel + Leisure Co. to Report Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results on February 18, 2026
feed.summary: Travel + Leisure Co. (NYSE: TNL) announced it will release its fourth quarter and full-year 2025 financial results on Wednesday, February 18, 2026, before the market opens. Following the release, a conference call will be held at 8:30 a.m. EST with President and CEO Michael D. Brown and CFO Erik Hoag to discuss the company's performance and business outlook. A webcast of the call will be accessible on the company's website for 90 days.
